description_long: This is a large, single-story log cabin with a prominent gabled roof and a spacious front porch supported by timber columns. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving it a rustic and natural appearance. The roof is dark and steeply pitched, with a central gable and additional smaller gables over the porch and side wings. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged along the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. The cabin sits on a rectangular grassy lot with a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. Stone or brickwork is visible at the base of the porch, adding to the sturdy, traditional aesthetic.
description: A large log cabin with a steep gabled roof, spacious front porch, and symmetrical window arrangement, set on a grassy lot with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a wide covered porch, timber columns, and a central gable above the doorway.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the porch and the layered gables, with the driveway curving alongside the cabin.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back facade with additional windows and the continuation of the log construction, but no visible porch.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the side gables, more windows, and the extension of the grassy lot behind the cabin.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with multiple intersecting gables and moderate overhangs, covered in dark asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows of medium size are symmetrically distributed along the front and sides, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually; the arrangement is balanced and regular.
attribute_door_placement: A single main door is centered on the front facade beneath the porch gable; no other exterior doors are visible.
